'''Acid lizards''' were gigantic [[Reptile/Legends|reptiles]] who dwelt underground on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. They possessed a scaled [[Color/Legends|purple]] hide, mottled with green spots. They are known as acid lizards due to the strong acid inside their large mouths. [[Gotar (acid lizard)|Gotar]] was an acid lizard. In [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], an acid lizard encountered [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] in the desert, causing a dent in Artoo's dome.

==Appearances==
